label: Ubudu RTLS — Tag → Zone
info:
Demo flow: polls the Ubudu RTLS API for the last known positions of all
assets, derives which tag is in which zone, and exposes the result via a
live dashboard, the debug sidebar, an HTTP endpoint (GET /tags) and an
optional MQTT publish.

Configuration is read from environment variables:
  RTLS_BASE_URL      (default https://rtls.ubudu.com/api)
  RTLS_NAMESPACE     your app namespace UUID  (required)
  RTLS_API_KEY       your RTLS API key        (required)
  POLL_INTERVAL_SEC  poll interval in seconds (default 5)
  MQTT_ENABLE        "true" to publish to MQTT (default false)
  MQTT_TOPIC         base topic               (default ubudu/rtls/zones)

name: Build RTLS request
Map tag → zone
Format "tag is in zone"
Filter box
label: Filter (name / tag / zone)
tooltip: Type to filter the table. Clear to show all tags.

name: Apply filter → table
Zone summary → card
MQTT fan-out (optional)
Serve latest snapshot
How this demo works (read me)
info:
Poll timer fires every POLL_INTERVAL_SEC seconds (default 5).

1. Build RTLS request — reads RTLS_BASE_URL / RTLS_NAMESPACE / RTLS_API_KEY
   from the environment and prepares GET /cache/{namespace}/positions with
   the X-API-Key header.
2. http request — calls the Ubudu RTLS API.
3. Map tag → zone — turns each CachedAssetPosition into a row
   { tag, name, zone, inZone, lat, lon, ageSeconds } using the embedded
   `zone` object. Tags with no zone or the sentinel 'OUTSIDE_ALL_ZONES'
   are normalized to one 'outside any zone' label. Also produces a
   per-zone count (zoneSummary) and caches the snapshot for /tags.
4. Outputs:
   • Dashboard        → http://localhost:1880/ui
       - Tags per zone : per-zone counts (summary card)
       - Live tag→zone : filterable table (type in the Filter box)
   • Debug log        → debug sidebar + container logs
   • MQTT (optional)  → set MQTT_ENABLE=true
   • HTTP JSON        → http://localhost:1880/tags  (includes zoneSummary)
